name: BatchTimeout
effect: Shorter → lower latency, more empty blocks. Longer → larger blocks, higher throughput, higher latency. Must be at least MaxMessageCount / expected_TPS.

name: MaxMessageCount
effect: Larger → more TPS per block, higher throughput, but higher memory pressure and propagation cost on peers. Smaller → lower latency.

name: AbsoluteMaxBytes
effect: Hard ceiling on block serialized size. Any tx larger than this is rejected. Must be > PreferredMaxBytes. Do not exceed 49 MB (gRPC 100 MB limit minus overhead).

name: PreferredMaxBytes
effect: Soft target block size. Orderer cuts block when approaching this size. Set to MaxMessageCount * avg_tx_size (~3-4 KB per tx). Larger → fewer blocks, higher throughput.

name: CORE_PEER_LIMITS_CONCURRENCY_GATEWAYSERVICE
effect: Max concurrent client submission requests. Requests beyond limit are REJECTED. Increase under high TPS load to avoid client-side errors.

name: CORE_PEER_LIMITS_CONCURRENCY_ENDORSERSERVICE
effect: Max concurrent endorsement requests. Reached limit → client gets error, must retry. Critical for high TPS — endorsements are the primary bottleneck.

name: CORE_PEER_LIMITS_CONCURRENCY_DELIVERSERVICE
effect: Max concurrent block delivery requests. If too low, block delivery queues up after commit, delaying client notification.

name: CORE_LEDGER_STATE_COUCHDBCONFIG_MAXBATCHUPDATESIZE
effect: Records per CouchDB bulk update. Larger → faster commit of large blocks, but higher memory pressure on peer and CouchDB. For blocks with 500+ txs, increase to 2000-5000.

name: CORE_LEDGER_STATE_COUCHDBCONFIG_CACHESIZE
effect: State cache size in MB. Must be multiple of 32. Larger → more state in memory, faster reads. For large state DB with sufficient RAM, set 128-512.

name: CORE_LEDGER_STATE_COUCHDBCONFIG_MAXRETRIES
effect: Max retry attempts for CouchDB operations. Increase if CouchDB is under heavy load and returns transient errors.

name: CORE_LEDGER_STATE_COUCHDBCONFIG_MAXRETRIESONSTARTUP
effect: Max retry attempts for CouchDB connection at peer startup. Only relevant during initial peer boot.

name: CORE_LEDGER_STATE_COUCHDBCONFIG_REQUESTTIMEOUT
effect: Timeout for each CouchDB request. Increase if CouchDB queries are slow (large datasets). Too low → spurious failures under load.

name: CORE_LEDGER_STATE_COUCHDBCONFIG_INTERNALQUERYLIMIT
effect: Max records per single CouchDB query. Larger queries use pagination. Increase only if chaincode queries consistently need large result sets.

name: CORE_PEER_GOSSIP_MAXPROPAGATIONBURSTSIZE
effect: Max messages buffered before flush to peers. Larger → better throughput, higher peak memory. Increase for high-throughput networks.

name: CORE_PEER_GOSSIP_MAXPROPAGATIONBURSTLATENCY
effect: Max wait before flushing gossip message batch. Shorter → faster propagation, more frequent sends. Longer → better batching, lower overhead.

name: CORE_PEER_GOSSIP_PROPAGATEPEERNUM
effect: Fan-out: number of peers to forward each gossip message to. Higher → faster dissemination, more network traffic. Increase in large orgs.

name: CORE_PEER_GOSSIP_PROPAGATEITERATIONS
effect: Number of gossip re-broadcast rounds. Higher → more reliable dissemination, but O(k^N) message explosion. Usually keep at 1.

name: CORE_PEER_GOSSIP_PULLINTERVAL
effect: Interval between anti-entropy pull rounds. Shorter → faster catch-up, more network overhead. Longer → slower state sync.

name: CORE_PEER_GOSSIP_PULLPEERNUM
effect: Peers to contact per anti-entropy pull round. Higher → faster sync, more requests. Increase in large organizations.

name: CORE_PEER_GOSSIP_REQUESTSTATEINFOINTERVAL
effect: How often to request StateInfo from channel peers. Shorter → faster topology awareness, more overhead.

name: CORE_PEER_GOSSIP_PUBLISHSTATEINFOINTERVAL
effect: How often to broadcast own StateInfo (ledger height, chaincodes). Shorter → fresher peer view, more gossip traffic.

name: CORE_PEER_GOSSIP_PUBLISHCERTPERIOD
effect: How often to re-publish TLS cert to channel peers. Security-related, minimal performance impact.

name: CORE_PEER_GOSSIP_DIALTIMEOUT
effect: Timeout for establishing gossip connection to a peer. Increase for high-latency (cross-DC) deployments.

name: CORE_PEER_GOSSIP_CONNTIMEOUT
effect: Connection timeout for gossip. Shorter → faster failure detection. Longer → fewer false timeouts on slow networks.

name: CORE_PEER_GOSSIP_RECVBUFFSIZE
effect: Receive buffer size for gossip messages. Larger → can handle more incoming gossip, but uses more memory.

name: CORE_PEER_GOSSIP_SENDBUFFSIZE
effect: Send buffer size for gossip messages. Larger → can queue more outgoing messages, higher memory use.

name: CORE_PEER_GOSSIP_DIGESTWAITTIME
effect: Time to wait for digest responses from peers before sending pull requests.

name: CORE_PEER_GOSSIP_REQUESTWAITTIME
effect: Time to wait for responses to pull requests. Increase on slow networks to avoid premature timeout.

name: CORE_PEER_GOSSIP_RESPONSEWAITTIME
effect: Time to wait for responses to state request messages.

name: CORE_PEER_GOSSIP_ALIVETIMEINTERVAL
effect: Frequency of heartbeat/alive messages. Shorter → faster failure detection, more gossip overhead.

name: CORE_PEER_GOSSIP_ALIVEEXPIRATIONTIMEOUT
effect: Time without heartbeat before a peer is declared dead. Shorter → faster failure detection but false positives under latency.

name: CORE_PEER_GOSSIP_RECONNECTINTERVAL
effect: Interval between reconnection attempts to dead peers. Shorter → faster recovery, more connection churn.

name: CORE_PEER_GOSSIP_MAXCONNECTIONATTEMPTS
effect: Max reconnection attempts to a peer before giving up. Higher → more persistent reconnection, but can waste resources.

name: CORE_PEER_GOSSIP_MSGEXPIRATIONFACTOR
effect: Message TTL as multiple of aliveTimeInterval. Higher → messages live longer, more reliable delivery, more memory.

name: CORE_PEER_GOSSIP_MEMBERSHIPTRACKERINTERVAL
effect: How often the membership tracker checks for expired/dead peers.

name: CORE_PEER_GOSSIP_MAXBLOCKCOUNTTOSTORE
effect: Max blocks buffered in memory for gossip to new peers. Larger → more memory, better catch-up for lagging peers.

name: CORE_PEER_GOSSIP_ELECTION_STARTUPGRACEPERIOD
effect: Grace period after peer startup before leader election starts. Longer → more stable initial membership.

name: CORE_PEER_GOSSIP_ELECTION_MEMBERSHIPSAMPLEINTERVAL
effect: Interval for checking alive peers during leader election.

name: CORE_PEER_GOSSIP_ELECTION_LEADERALIVETHRESHOLD
effect: Time without heartbeat before peers elect a new leader. Shorter → faster failover, higher risk of leader flapping.

name: CORE_PEER_GOSSIP_ELECTION_LEADERELECTIONDURATION
effect: Max duration of a leader election campaign. Shorter → faster resolution if stuck.

name: CORE_PEER_GOSSIP_STATE_ENABLED
effect: Enable peer-to-peer state transfer for lagging peers to catch up on blocks. Should usually stay enabled.

name: CORE_PEER_GOSSIP_STATE_CHECKINTERVAL
effect: Interval for checking if the peer has fallen behind other peers' ledger height.

name: CORE_PEER_GOSSIP_STATE_RESPONSETIMEOUT
effect: Timeout for state transfer responses. Increase for slow networks or large state payloads.

name: CORE_PEER_GOSSIP_STATE_BATCHSIZE
effect: Number of blocks to request per state transfer batch. Larger → faster catch-up, more memory.

name: CORE_PEER_GOSSIP_STATE_BLOCKBUFFERSIZE
effect: Number of blocks to buffer in memory during state transfer before applying to ledger.

name: CORE_PEER_GOSSIP_STATE_MAXRETRIES
effect: Max retry attempts for state transfer. Increase if peer frequently fails to catch up.

name: CORE_PEER_GOSSIP_PVTDATA_PULLRETRYTHRESHOLD
effect: Max time to keep retrying pull of missing private data from other peers.

name: CORE_PEER_GOSSIP_PVTDATA_TRANSIENTSTOREMAXBLOCKRETENTION
effect: Max blocks for which private data is kept in transient store. Higher → more disk/memory, longer data availability.

name: CORE_PEER_GOSSIP_PVTDATA_PUSHACKTIMEOUT
effect: Timeout for ACK from recipient of pushed private data. Increase on slow networks.

name: CORE_PEER_GOSSIP_PVTDATA_BTLPULLMARGIN
effect: Extra blocks before BTL (block-to-live) expiry to attempt pulling missing private data.

name: CORE_PEER_GOSSIP_PVTDATA_RECONCILEBATCHSIZE
effect: Batch size for private data reconciliation. Larger → faster reconciliation, more network load.

name: CORE_PEER_GOSSIP_PVTDATA_RECONCILESLEEPINTERVAL
effect: Sleep interval between private data reconciliation cycles. Shorter → faster reconciliation, more network traffic.

name: CORE_PEER_GOSSIP_PVTDATA_IMPLICITCOLLECTIONDISSEMINATIONPOLICY_REQUIREDPEERCOUNT
effect: Min peers that must ACK private data dissemination for endorsement to succeed. 0 = fire-and-forget, ≥1 = wait for ACKs. Higher → more reliable, slower endorsement.

name: CORE_PEER_GOSSIP_PVTDATA_IMPLICITCOLLECTIONDISSEMINATIONPOLICY_MAXPEERCOUNT
effect: Max peers to disseminate private data to at endorsement time. Higher → more copies, more bandwidth.

name: CORE_PEER_KEEPALIVE_INTERVAL
effect: gRPC keepalive ping interval for peer-to-peer connections. Shorter → faster dead-connection detection, more keepalive traffic.

name: CORE_PEER_KEEPALIVE_TIMEOUT
effect: gRPC keepalive timeout before declaring connection dead. Shorter → faster detection, more false positives.

name: CORE_PEER_KEEPALIVE_MININTERVAL
effect: Min interval between keepalive pings enforced by the server side. Longer → less server processing overhead.

name: CORE_PEER_KEEPALIVE_CLIENT_INTERVAL
effect: Client-side gRPC keepalive ping interval. Shorter → faster detection of broken connections.

name: CORE_PEER_KEEPALIVE_CLIENT_TIMEOUT
effect: Client-side gRPC keepalive timeout. Shorter → faster failure detection.

name: CORE_PEER_KEEPALIVE_DELIVERYCLIENT_INTERVAL
effect: Delivery client (orderer connection) keepalive ping interval.

name: CORE_PEER_KEEPALIVE_DELIVERYCLIENT_TIMEOUT
effect: Delivery client keepalive timeout. Shorter → faster detection of orderer connection loss.

name: CORE_PEER_GATEWAY_ENDORSEMENTTIMEOUT
effect: Peer gateway endorsement timeout. Increase for high-load scenarios where endorsement may be slow.

name: CORE_PEER_GATEWAY_BROADCASTTIMEOUT
effect: Peer gateway broadcast (submit to orderer) timeout. Increase for large transactions or slow orderers.

name: CORE_PEER_GATEWAY_DIALTIMEOUT
effect: Peer gateway connection dial timeout. Increase for slow/far-endpoint networks.

name: CORE_PEER_DELIVERYCLIENT_RECONNECTTOTALTIMETHRESHOLD
effect: Total time to keep trying to reconnect delivery client to orderer before giving up entirely.

name: CORE_PEER_DELIVERYCLIENT_CONNTIMEOUT
effect: Delivery client individual connection attempt timeout. Shorter → faster failure, more retries.

name: CORE_PEER_DELIVERYCLIENT_RECONNECTBACKOFFTHRESHOLD
effect: Time threshold before switching to exponential backoff for delivery client reconnection. Shorter → faster backoff escalation.

name: CORE_PEER_DELIVERYCLIENT_BLOCKCENSORSHIPTIMEOUTKEY
effect: Timeout for block censorship detection. If a block is held by orderer for this long, peer may trigger failover.

name: CORE_PEER_DELIVERYCLIENT_MINIMALRECONNECTINTERVAL
effect: Min delay between delivery client reconnection attempts. Prevents reconnection storms.

name: CORE_PEER_AUTHENTICATION_TIMEWINDOW
effect: Time window for identity token validity. Longer → less frequent re-auth, wider attack window. Security/performance trade-off.

name: CORE_PEER_CLIENT_CONNTIMEOUT
effect: Timeout for client (SDK) connections to peer. Increase for high-latency client networks.

name: CORE_PEER_DISCOVERY_AUTHCACHEMAXSIZE
effect: Max entries in service discovery auth cache. Larger → faster auth lookups, more memory.

name: CORE_PEER_DISCOVERY_AUTHCACHEPURGERETENTIONRATIO
effect: Fraction of cache entries retained during purge. Higher → more entries kept, fewer cache misses, more memory.

name: CORE_PEER_MAXRECVMSGSIZE
effect: Max gRPC message size peer can receive. Must be ≥ AbsoluteMaxBytes + overhead. Set to 100 MB default; only increase if blocks exceed this.

name: CORE_PEER_MAXSENDMSGSIZE
effect: Max gRPC message size peer can send. Must accommodate blocks + headers. Default 100 MB is adequate for most deployments.

name: CORE_CHAINCODE_INSTALLTIMEOUT
effect: Timeout for chaincode install operations. Increase for large chaincode packages or slow machines.

name: CORE_CHAINCODE_STARTUPTIMEOUT
effect: Timeout for chaincode container startup. Increase for slow Docker or large images.

name: CORE_CHAINCODE_EXECUTETIMEOUT
effect: Timeout for chaincode execution (chaincode → peer round trip). Critical for performance — too short kills slow txs; too long masks problems. Increase if chaincode does heavy computation.

name: CORE_CHAINCODE_KEEPALIVE
effect: Keepalive interval (seconds) for chaincode containers. 0 = disabled. Set >0 to keep containers warm between invocations.

name: CORE_VM_DOCKER_HOSTCONFIG_LOGCONFIG_CONFIG_MAX_SIZE
effect: Max size of a single chaincode container log file. Larger → more troubleshooting data, more disk.

name: CORE_VM_DOCKER_HOSTCONFIG_LOGCONFIG_CONFIG_MAX_FILE
effect: Max number of log files per chaincode container before rotation. Higher → more historical logs, more disk.

name: CORE_VM_DOCKER_HOSTCONFIG_MEMORY
effect: Memory limit per chaincode Docker container (2 GB default). Increase for memory-intensive chaincodes. Too low → OOM kills.

name: CORE_LEDGER_STATE_TOTALQUERYLIMIT
effect: Hard cap on total records returned by a chaincode query (sum of all internalQueryLimit batches). Higher → allows larger queries, more memory. Use pagination instead of raising this.

name: CORE_LEDGER_PVTDATASTORE_COLLELGPROCMAXDBBATCHSIZE
effect: Max batch size for private data collection eligibility processing. Larger → faster pvtdata processing, more DB load.

name: CORE_LEDGER_PVTDATASTORE_COLLELGPROCDBBATCHESINTERVAL
effect: Interval between private data collection eligibility DB batch processing. Shorter → faster pvtdata processing, more DB load.

name: CORE_LEDGER_PVTDATASTORE_DEPRIORITIZEDDATARECONCILERINTERVAL
effect: Interval for reconciling deprioritized private data. Longer → less background reconciliation load, slower pvtdata catch-up.

name: CORE_LEDGER_PVTDATASTORE_PURGEINTERVAL
effect: Purge expired private data every N blocks. Higher → less frequent cleanup, more accumulated pvtdata on disk.

name: CORE_METRICS_STATSD_WRITEINTERVAL
effect: Interval for flushing peer metrics to StatsD. Shorter → more real-time metrics, more network I/O.

name: ORDERER_GENERAL_KEEPALIVE_SERVERMININTERVAL
effect: Orderer-side min interval between client keepalive pings. Longer → less orderer CPU, slower dead-connection detection.

name: ORDERER_GENERAL_KEEPALIVE_SERVERINTERVAL
effect: Orderer keepalive ping interval to clients. Shorter → more network traffic, faster detection of dropped clients.

name: ORDERER_GENERAL_KEEPALIVE_SERVERTIMEOUT
effect: Orderer keepalive timeout before declaring client disconnected. Shorter → faster cleanup, more false positives.

name: ORDERER_GENERAL_MAXRECVMSGSIZE
effect: Max gRPC message size orderer can receive. Must be ≥ AbsoluteMaxBytes + overhead. Default 100 MB.

name: ORDERER_GENERAL_MAXSENDMSGSIZE
effect: Max gRPC message size orderer can send. Must accommodate blocks. Default 100 MB.

name: ORDERER_GENERAL_BACKOFF_BASEDELAY
effect: Base delay for orderer cluster connection backoff. Increase for more aggressive backoff under heavy load.

name: ORDERER_GENERAL_BACKOFF_MULTIPLIER
effect: Multiplier for exponential backoff on orderer reconnection. Higher → faster escalation of backoff intervals.

name: ORDERER_GENERAL_BACKOFF_MAXDELAY
effect: Cap on backoff delay for orderer reconnection. Longer → less frequent retries at max backoff.

name: ORDERER_GENERAL_THROTTLING_RATE
effect: Max messages/second processed by orderer. 0 = no throttling. Set >0 to cap orderer message rate as an overload protection.

name: ORDERER_GENERAL_THROTTLING_INACTIVITYTIMEOUT
effect: Inactivity timeout for throttled connections. After this period of no messages, connection is eligible for throttling reset.

name: ORDERER_GENERAL_CLUSTER_SENDBUFFERSIZE
effect: Send buffer size for orderer cluster (Raft) messages. Larger → can buffer more messages, uses more memory.

name: ORDERER_GENERAL_AUTHENTICATION_TIMEWINDOW
effect: Orderer-side identity token validity time window. Longer → less frequent re-auth, wider attack window.

name: ORDERER_METRICS_STATSD_WRITEINTERVAL
effect: Interval for flushing orderer metrics to StatsD.

name: ORDERER_CHANNELPARTICIPATION_MAXREQUESTBODYSIZE
effect: Max request body size for orderer channel participation API. Only relevant for channel join operations.
